scripts.dev: bun run prepare:apple-fm-bridge && bun run build:ui && electrobun dev
scripts.build: bun run prepare:apple-fm-bridge && bun run build:ui && electrobun build && bun run verify:apple-fm-bridge
scripts.verify: bun run typecheck && bun test tests/*.test.ts && bun run build:ui && bun build src/bun/index.ts --outdir /tmp/khala-code-desktop-bun-build --target bun
